name: Gen the Diamond Tiger
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>虎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>菱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>之</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>の</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, at the end of the Battle Phase: Return this card from the field to the hand. You can only use each of the following effects of "Gen the Diamond Tiger" once per turn. During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon 1 "Ken the Warrior Dragon" from your hand or Deck to your opponent's field in Defense Position. If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of "Ken the Warrior Dragon": Discard 1 card.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, at the end of the Battle Phase: Return this card from the field to the hand. You can only use each of the following effects of "Gen the Diamond Tiger" once per turn. During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon 1 "Ken the Warrior Dragon" from your hand or Deck to your opponent's field in Defense Position. If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of "Ken the Warrior Dragon": Discard 1 card.
eff: Once per turn, at the end of the Battle Phase: Return this card from the field to the hand. You can only use each of the following effects of "Gen the Diamond Tiger" once per turn. During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon 1 "Ken the Warrior Dragon" from your hand or Deck to your opponent's field in Defense Position. If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of "Ken the Warrior Dragon": Discard 1 card.

action: Returns itself from field to hand
summoning: Special Summons from your hand to your opponent's field
Special Summons from your Deck to your opponent's field
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
